paper_title: Pollen, Health, and Environmental Data Analysis

methods.description: This method involves collecting daily pollen data from monitors, geocoding their locations, and determining the start and end of pollen seasons using specific thresholds.

steps.description: We obtained daily pollen data for 2008-2015 from 28 monitors that are part of the NAB network of the American Academy of Allergy, Asthma, and Immunology (AAAAI).
steps.searchable_summary: fetch daily pollen data from NAB network

steps.description: We geocoded the physical address of these locations to identify the Metropolitan Statistical Area (MSA) in which these monitors reside.
steps.searchable_summary: geocode monitor locations to identify MSA

steps.description: Identification of pollen season start and end dates using a novel approach based on cumulative pollen counts.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate pollen season start and end dates
outputs: pollen season start and end dates

methods.description: This method characterizes daily pollen concentrations into categories based on NAB thresholds and modifies them to examine health effects at lower levels.

steps.description: We used the pollen thresholds published by the NAB as the benchmark to characterize pollen concentrations each day.
steps.searchable_summary: characterize daily pollen concentrations using NAB thresholds

steps.description: We linearly interpolated pollen data by tree, grass, and weed within their specific seasons each year to account for missing data.
We conducted a series of sensitivity analyses to compare the results with percentile-based definition of pollen concentration and consecutive days of exposure.
steps.searchable_summary: perform sensitivity analysis on pollen concentration

methods.description: This method involves collecting health data from the Truven Health MarketScan database and calculating daily counts of medication fills and physician visits.

steps.description: We obtained health data from the Truven Health MarketScan Research database for the years 2008-2015.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch health data from Truven Health MarketScan

steps.description: We calculated a daily count of medication fills by MSA based on the day of the fill.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate daily medication fills by MSA

steps.description: We estimated daily counts of AR visits based on a patient's first visit in a calendar year.

methods.description: This method involves creating daily MSA-level estimates of environmental variables such as temperature, humidity, and air pollutants.

steps.description: We created daily MSA-level estimates of environmental variables using predictions from the NLDAS model.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch environmental data using NLDAS model

steps.description: The grid-level predictions were converted to county-level estimates and then to MSA-level estimates using a population weighted approach.
steps.searchable_summary: convert grid-level predictions to MSA-level estimates

steps.description: We collected daily measures of air pollutants from the Bayesian space-time Downscaler fusion modelling framework.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch air pollutant data using Downscaler framework
